project_metadata.name: TrekBazaar
project_metadata.description: Premium B2B2C marketplace for adventure tourism in India.

architecture.frontend: Hybrid SSR/Client. Heavy reliance on Server Actions for mutations.
architecture.backend: Postgres RLS. State machines managed via Enums.

product_philosophy.trust_engine: Never fake data. Trust is derived mathematically from verified database facts.
product_philosophy.master_treks: TrekBazaar owns the itinerary page. Operators only own the departure instance.
product_philosophy.aesthetic_authority: UI must look like an editorial magazine / premium SaaS (Stripe/Linear). No generic components.

engineering_rules: Never hardcode state. Drive UI from database enums.
Always run lint, tsc --noEmit, and build before pushing.
Do not break RLS. Use standard createClient() for user actions.

completed: B2B Onboarding Steps 1-5 (Company Info, Due Diligence, Terms, Banking)
current_state.next_up: Integrate First Trek & Departure creation into Onboarding Wizard Step 6 & 7.
